General.Name: AUTO1 Group SE
General.Description: AUTO1 Group SE, a technology company, operates a digital automotive platform for buying and selling used cars online in Germany, France, Italy, and internationally. The company operates in two segments, Merchant and Retail. It is involved in the operation of AUTO1.com platform for the sale of used cars to commercial dealers; Autohero.com for the sale of used cars to private customers; and wirkaufendeinauto.de, an online platform to sell used cars to AUTO1. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Berlin, Germany.
